templateMetadata.description: Visualize marketing funnel conversion from awareness to customer, grouped by lifecycle stage
templateMetadata.useCase: Track funnel health, identify conversion bottlenecks, measure stage drop-off rates
customizationPoints: Lifecycle_Stage__c field name (update to match your org's field)
Campaign filter (specific campaign types or names)
Additional filters for segment, region, or product
prerequisites: Lifecycle_Stage__c field on Contact object (picklist: Aware, Engaged, MQL, SQL, Opportunity, Customer)
Contacts with Campaign Members report type

customizationPoints: Lifecycle_Stage__c field name (update to match your org's field)
Campaign filter (specific campaign types or names)
Additional filters for segment, region, or product

reportMetadata.name: Marketing Lifecycle Funnel - {Period}
reportMetadata.description: Marketing funnel showing progression from awareness to customer

reportFilters.customizationNote: Change to LAST_90_DAYS, THIS_YEAR, or specific date range

groupingsDown.customizationNote: Replace Lifecycle_Stage__c with your org's lifecycle field name

aggregates.name: RowCount
aggregates.description: Count of contacts per lifecycle stage

customSummaryFormulas.name: Conversion_Rate_To_Next_Stage
customSummaryFormulas.description: % of contacts that advanced to next stage
customSummaryFormulas.note: Requires manual calculation or custom field

steps: 1. Verify Lifecycle_Stage__c field exists on Contact (or update field name in template)
2. Create picklist values: Aware, Engaged, MQL, SQL, Opportunity, Customer (in order)
3. Update reportFilters to match desired date range
4. Replace {Period} in report name with actual period (e.g., 'Q1 2025')
6. Test with sample data before using in dashboard
